violations.text: Observed that food safety professional's certificate was expired 8/7/25. Provided link to food safety resources below: List of Certified Food Safety Manager Course Instructors New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front area, is not tight-fitting/needs adjustment. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2025

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (air break observed at time of inspection). A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (air break observed at time of inspection). A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
